title: Healing Mod: Rebooted
description: Healing Mod: Rebooted is a complete reimagining of the original Healing Mod v1.3.0, rebuilt from the ground up for Minecraft 1.21
body:
🌿 Healing Mod Rebooted – NeoForge
“Not all heroes hurt.”
Healing Mod Rebooted is a complete overhaul and spiritual successor to the original Healing Mod — rebuilt from the ground up with modern Minecraft (1.21.1) in mind. This mod focuses on positive gameplay mechanics, offering a fresh take on progression through healing, restoration, and supportive combat mechanics rather than just brute force.

🧪 What Makes It Different?
While most mods and vanilla content focus on dealing damage, this mod introduces a healing-based progression system, a new dimension, custom dungeons, and healer-vs-damage mechanics. Perfect for players who enjoy support roles, RPG-like elements, or just want something refreshing and unique.

🌍 Key Features
✨ Regeneration Items
Craftable healing artifacts that can be consumed or held to slowly restore health.

Comes in multiple tiers, with future upgrades planned to unlock enhanced abilities (AOE healing, buffs, etc.).

🌀 Healer Dimension
A beautiful and mysterious custom dimension filled with life, healing essence, and unique blocks.

Accessed via a special portal recipe (customizable).

Surface-generated healer dungeons contain loot, healing mobs, and lore-building elements.

🧱 Damage Dungeon Structures
Deadly underground structures located in the Nether (or optional placement in custom biomes).

Inhabited by corrupted mobs and traps, led by the fearsome King Damage Man.

👑 King Damage Man (Boss Fight)
High-stakes battle that challenges even well-equipped players.

Uses unique AI patterns and area-denial attacks.

Drops powerful damage-related items upon defeat.

🏆 Custom Advancements
A new set of healing-based and boss progression advancements.

Example:

"Not All Heroes Hurt" – Craft your first Regeneration item.

"King of Pain, Slain" – Defeat King Damage Man in his lair.

💡 Use Cases
Great for RPG-style playthroughs and modpacks focusing on light vs. dark themes.

Can be used in peaceful, pacifist, or support-based roles.

Integrates well with dimension exploration and structure generation mods.

🔧 Technical Info
🔄 Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.1.

🌍 Custom structures use Surface Jigsaw Generation in Healer Dimension.

⚙️ Built to work alongside other mods without interference.

🛠️ In Development
This is just the beginning. Upcoming versions will include:

New healing mobs and guardians

Animated blocks and environmental healing effects

🎮 Modpack Permissions
✅ You may use this mod in any public or private modpacks.
📢 Credit is appreciated!
🚫 Please do not rehost without permission.

💬 Feedback
Got ideas, bugs, or suggestions?
Join the discussion and submit feedback via GitHub Issues or our community Discord (coming soon!).
